page: UpCloud STARTER-2xCPU-8GB is a general-purpose virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 shared vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor running at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 8.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core, alongside 40 GB of local SSD storage. Network connectivity includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark data indicates strong single-core capabilities, with stress-ng single-core CPU performance, single-threaded gzip compression, and single-threaded bzip3 decompression all placing in the top tier. However, multi-threaded performance is more limited due to the shared CPU allocation and 2-core limit, with multi-core stress-ng performance and memory bandwidth falling into the average range, while multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and PassMark CPU scores rank in the bottom 25 percent.

This server type offers a cost-effective entry point for workloads that require bursty single-threaded processing rather than sustained multi-core execution. The shared CPU model provides high resource density at a lower cost profile, making it suitable for lightweight web serving, Redis caching, and basic utility scripting. It is less suited for database operations, heavy multi-threaded processing, or large language model inference, where benchmarks show weaker performance.
description: UpCloud STARTER-2xCPU-8GB is a KVM-based virtual server configured with 2 shared vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, delivering 4.0 GB of memory per core. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9575F processor running at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture, it includes 40 GB of local SSD storage and a single public IPv4 address. Benchmark results reveal top-tier single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds, though multi-threaded capabilities and database operations fall into the lower performance tiers due to the shared CPU allocation. This resource profile offers a budget-friendly option for lightweight workloads. It is best suited for basic web serving, single-threaded utility scripts, and Redis caching rather than resource-intensive database hosting or multi-threaded applications.
og_description: UpCloud STARTER-2xCPU-8GB is a KVM virtual server with 2 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 8 GB RAM, and 40 GB SSD storage. It delivers strong single-core performance for lightweight web serving and utility workloads.

tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server offering strong single-core performance and balanced memory for lightweight utility and web serving workloads.
